rows.description: Recepta pro hoc Anno ad 2dum Diem Novembris. A.D. 1819.
rows.notes: Clear reading of the page title. No monetary amounts present.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is clearly a quarter (q).
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. No fraction.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. No fraction.

Clear reading of amounts. This row appears to be a subtotal. A calculation discrepancy is noted: sum of preceding rows (970.16.2 1/4 + 30.0.0 + 1754.0.1) equals 2754.16.3 1/4, but this row records 2754.16.3 3/4. Extracting the value exactly as written.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is clearly a quarter (q).

Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is a half (ob). A calculation discrepancy is noted: sum of Row 5 and Row 6 (2754.16.3 3/4 + 1647.9.0 1/4) equals 4402.5.4, but this row records 4402.5.3 1/2. Extracting the value exactly as written.
Clear reading of the section header. No monetary amounts present.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. No fraction.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is a half (loop).
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. No fraction.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is a half (loop). Calculation (700.11.7 + 270.7.11 1/2 + 2104.8.3) confirms this sum is correct.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is a half (loop). This amount is a reference to the 'Summa Receptarum' total.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. Pence fraction is a half (loop). This amount is a reference to the 'Summa Solutorum' total.
Clear reading of text and amounts. Column alignment is unambiguous. No fraction. Calculation (4402.5.3 1/2 - 3075.7.9 1/2) confirms this subtraction is correct.
Clear reading of the header text introducing the signatories.

Clear reading of the signatory name and title. No monetary amounts.
Clear reading of the signatory name and title. 'Glubb' is slightly condensed but legible. 'Burs. Senr.' is a clear abbreviation. No monetary amounts.

Clear reading of the signatory name and title. The initial 'V' in 'Heys' is slightly less clear than other letters but context makes it plausible. 'Burs. Junr.' is a clear abbreviation. No monetary amounts.
Clear reading of the signatory name and title. No monetary amounts.
